channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.description: Cloud computing transformed how applications are built and deployed. It offered scalability, flexibility, and centralized control. But it also introduced a critical limitation: latency. As...

item.title: 5 Seconds to Install. 60-90% Less Noise. Forever.
item.description: Here's the entire ContextZip setup: cargo install contextzip eval "$(contextzip init)" Time to install: ~5 seconds on a warm Rust toolchain. Time to configure: 0 seconds. There's nothing to...

item.title: Runbook Automation: From 45-Minute Fixes to 90-Second Recoveries

item.title: Microsoft’s finally giving up on its massive Surface Hub touchscreen displays
item.description: Microsoft is reportedly ending production of its Surface Hub 3 collaborative office display and canceling plans for a Surface Hub 4, according to Windows Central. The extra-large digital...

item.title: Patch Tuesday, April 2026 Edition
item.description: Microsoft today pushed software updates to fix a staggering 167 security vulnerabilities in its Windows operating systems and related software, including a SharePoint Server zero-day and a...

item.title: The FCC just saved Netgear from its router ban for no obvious reason
item.description: The United States' foreign router ban didn't make a whole lot of sense, and today may not change that. The FCC has just granted Netgear a conditional approval to import its future consumer...

item.title: Dozens of 4K Blu-rays are included in Amazon’s three for $33 sale
item.description: Amazon has switched on its semi-regular three for $33 sale for a large batch of 4K Blu-ray movies. As usual, there are too many to list individually, though it’s a comprehensive mix of old and new...

item.title: Prime Video is bundling Apple TV Plus and Peacock for a limited time
item.description: Amazon is offering Prime Video subscribers a way to get Apple TV Plus and Peacock Premium Plus at a discount. With a new bundle, subscribers can access all content from both services directly...

item.title: Privacy advocates want Google to stop handing consumer data over to ICE
item.description: The Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) is asking the attorneys general of California and New York to investigate Google for deceptive trade practices, saying the tech giant fails to notify users...

item.title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos
item.description: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.

item.title: The attacks on Sam Altman are a warning for the AI world
item.description: Before allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home, the 20-year-old accused attacker wrote about his fear that the AI race would cause humans to go extinct, the San...

item.title: Redefining the future of software engineering
item.description: Software engineering has experienced two seismic shifts this century. First was the rise of the open source movement, which gradually made code accessible to developers and engineers everywhere....

item.title: Elon Musk grilled by senator over X Money plans
item.description: Elon Musk is facing questions about his upcoming payments platform, X Money, and whether it will allow users to safely perform transactions. In a letter to Musk on Tuesday, Sen. Elizabeth Warren...

item.title: You can grab LG’s B5 OLED TV for over 50 percent off right now
item.description: ​​If you’re looking to get OLED picture quality without spending a couple thousand dollars, LG’s 48-inch B5 OLED TV is on sale for $599.99 ($700 off) at Best Buy, which is one of the best prices...

item.title: Leaked images reveal a dual-lens pro version of DJI’s next Osmo Pocket camera
item.description: Reliable leaker Igor Bogdanov shared an image on X yesterday of an unseen person holding two versions of a handheld stabilized camera, including one that's rumored to be a pro version of the DJI...

item.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain
item.description: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to...

item.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
item.description: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.

item.title: How to Use Google Chrome’s New AI-Powered ‘Skills’
item.description: The premade Skills available through the Gemini sidebar in Chrome include ways to maximize protein in recipes or summarize YouTube videos.

item.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome

item.title: New PHP Composer Flaws Enable Arbitrary Command Execution — Patches Released
